behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names both file paths, the new SVG path, CheckCircleHalfIcon identifier, CircleIcon/CheckCircleIcon, the classes w-4 h-4 and animate-spin, and the status strings todo/in_progress/done.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction specifies exact imports ('CheckCircleHalfIcon from #/icons/u-check-circle-half.svg?react'), exact filename, and exact behavior per case - this is essentially dictating the fix rather than describing the bug.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for CheckCircleHalfIcon name and absence of animate-spin/LoadingIcon; any correct alternative matching the instruction would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include subprocess calls to npm run build, lint, tsc --noEmit, and translation completeness check.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual import statements, case branches, and a successful build which would fail with a stub.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All criteria (icon file, imports, no animate-spin, other cases unchanged, build/lint/typecheck) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named and documented with fail-to-pass/pass-to-pass labels.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names are consistent across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction explicitly names affected files, exact import paths ('#/icons/u-check-circle-half.svg?react'), class names to use/remove, and specific icon identifiers - essentially a step-by-step recipe.
